sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50062" key="i(ero/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερό-μαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50062.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holy seer,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).148</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
